elements.name: node
comments: A tree node with unlimited depth.
Is the schema base node.
In itself works as a comment line.

methods.name: exec
comments: var result = string.match(re)

elements.name: regexpElement
comments: composable element of a regexp

methods.name: toValue
comments: log 'expected', this

elements.name: bracket
comments: one required group of juxtaposed components
juxtaposed: separated by whitespaces

elements.name: bracketQuestionMark
comments: one optional group of juxtaposed components
juxtaposed: separated by whitespaces

elements.name: bracketPlus
comments: at least one or many groups of juxtaposed components
juxtaposed: separated by whitespaces

elements.name: bracketHashmark
comments: zero or many groups of comma separated juxtaposed components
juxtaposed: separated by whitespaces

elements.name: ampersand
comments: one required group of joined components
joined: (no juxtaposed) without separators

elements.name: ampersandQuestionmark
comments: one optional group of joined components
joined: (no juxtaposed) without separators

elements.name: ampersandPlus
comments: at least one or many groups of joined components
for completness of symbols but has no sense, has the same meaning of `ampersand`
joined: (no juxtaposed) without separators

elements.name: ampersand
comments: at least one or many groups of comma separated joined components
joined: (no juxtaposed) without separators

elements.name: plus
comments: at least one or many groups of juxtaposed components

elements.name: paren
comments: (x) - Matches x and remembers the match. These are called capturing groups.

elements.name: graph

methods.name: toValue
comments: log 'graph.toValue.ret', ret
Quantifier
x{n}   - Where n is a positive integer. Matches exactly n occurrences of the preceding item x.
x{n,}	 - Where n is a positive integer. Matches at least n occurrences of the preceding item x.
x{n,m} - Where n and m are positive integers. Matches at least n and at most m occurrences of the preceding item x.

elements.name: parenQuestionMarkEqual
comments: Assertion
x(?=y) Matches x only if x is followed by y.

elements.name: parenQuestionMarkExlamationPoint
comments: Assertion
x(?!y) Matches x only if x is not followed by y.

elements.name: parenColon
comments: Named captures
x(?!y) Matches x only if x is not followed by y.

elements.name: bracketCap
comments: A negated or complemented character set
